title: dianthus orientalis var. macropetalus
intro: Dianthus orientalis var. macropetalus, also known as the large-flowered dianthus or pink dianthus, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family and is native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Dianthus orientalis var. macropetalus include its ability to treat digestive issues, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions and wounds, or internally to promote digestive health and reduce inflammation.
